experiences.highlights:
Improved web modules and database integrations by optimizing SQL queries, creating database views, and implementing fixes that increased data retrieval accuracy and overall system reliability.
Contributed to the development of a React and Next.js platform that automated information search and retrieval, helping achieve major process improvements.
Collaborated with a 4-person team to replace a manual workflow with a web-based solution, reducing report generation time from 15–30 minutes to under 5 minutes.
Supported the transition from manual database-driven searches to an automated Next.js, React, and SQL-based platform, improving information retrieval, traceability of data access, and accessibility across 30,000+ registered records.

Contributed to the development of a web-based platform for recycling, repair, and donation workflows for furniture and appliances using Next.js, React, and CRUD operations.
Built core CRUD functionality and supported feature planning, helping improve information management and platform usability.
Contributed to system planning, feature organization, and technical documentation for the ReCyClapp platform in a 2-person capstone project, helping define modules, organize development tasks, and improve coordination throughout implementation.

Delivered customer support in English and Spanish, assisting customers with internet connectivity issues by identifying root causes, explaining solutions clearly, and guiding them through troubleshooting steps.
Documented key technical details and escalated cases to a 10-person support team, helping maintain response quality and service times of 15–25 minutes.
Strengthened communication, adaptability, and problem-solving skills by supporting customers with internet connectivity issues, including service interruptions, slow connections, and troubleshooting guidance, in a fast-paced service environment.
